Chill Dagger  
 

Placeable
Slot: RANGE SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 21
DMG: 5 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
SV COLD: +10
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

I was hunting in Dulak and this dropped off a Stormwave deckhand...imagine that

Scholar
221 posts
Likely given to the mob by a chanter. =p

Better question is, why sacrifice this for the end result weapon? This one seems better to me damage-wise. /shrug
▲ Page top
who would pay for these things?
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2002 at 9:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775235755
1 post
I've seen a merchant selling them for 2pp apiece. and somebody is tryingto sell one for 45pp. that's nuts
▲ Page top
RIP OFF!
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 12:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592793169098
143 posts
THis item is a rip off! I paid 100pp for 3 of these. the dem thing doesn't even say its Secondary/Range Slot ONLY! Now I am stuck with it and I cannot use!

I repeat gain - the item discription doesn't say that it cannot be used in PRIMARY hand!
:(
▲ Page top
RE: RIP OFF!
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2002 at 4:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251310993
7 posts
Not a rip off... its an item to add to your resist gear... which would be handy when facing .. say.. Vox :) 10svc is pretty nice on a range slot.
▲ Page top
RE: RIP OFF!
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 8:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251515951
281 posts
not totally wasted...but mostly :( u may still equip them in your range slot as it has a range of 40 on it. so...put er in there and boom +10svc

QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 4:28 PM Rating: Good

37 posts
I'm guessing the logic behind this is that a small little dagger that pierces is not an honorable weapon to use. Same reason Paladins don't kick.

Elite Frost Giant also drops this
QuoteReply
# May 06 2001 at 1:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1696205787970
Sage
190 posts
Just had one of these drop off an Elite Frost Giant in Iceclad. Was one of the two that stand guard at base of the Dragon Bridge leading to Eastern Wastes. I'm equipping it as a Cold Resistance gear when needed...not sure if there are any other +10svCold items that i can put in my range slot when i need to buff up my cold resistance.....
▲ Page top
RE: Elite Frost Giant also drops this
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2002 at 4:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758433518
Scholar
160 posts
You can use a Runed Bone Fork. Drops in U Guk from a Froglok Gaz Squire. Anyway it gives +10 to Fire, Cold and Magic in the range slot. It's his rare, so it may be frustrating, but I luckily got it on the 1st try. You can get it solo way before you could get this dagger. I did it at level 30-31 or so and the frog was way green. IMO a great resist item for low-mid level and beyond maybe.
▲ Page top
Ranged and off hand only
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2001 at 7:40 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Careful observation of this weapon's stats reveals that it only works inthe SECONDARY and RANGE slots. Nobody can use it in their primary slot, which is a shame since it would be a decent primary hand slot weapon for low level rogues. Good for raising dual wield skill, because it has such a low delay.
▲ Page top

Uncommon spawn around the Tower is a Pulsating Icestorm. Killed it about 10 times in three days, every time it dropped Chill Dagger.

# Sep 02 2001 at 1:11 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
YOu know its amazing... i just bought one and i too couldn't put it in my secondary slot... it must be bugged... that or the fact that i don't yet have dual weild will not allow me to equip it there... (in case no one caught on the first part was dripping with sarcasm) come people think before you post. Just because something doesn't work the way you think it should when you want it to doesn't mean that its bugged or any other numerous derogatory comments.
